heading: Tuesday Night
text: Fair early; increasing clouds late. Chance of a late-night shower far north. Lows from the mid 50s to lower 60s. Southwest winds decreasing to 5 to 10 mph, except gusting to 35 mph early in the St. Lawrence Valley.

heading: Wednesday
text: Mostly cloudy south, partly cloudy north. Slight chance of an evening shower. Lows in the low to mid 50s south and in the broad northwestern valleys, mid 40s to around 50 elsewhere north. Winds from the north to northwest, decreasing to 5 mph or less, except continuing at 5 to 10 mph in the Champlain Valley
